parents.subject: LU-16518 build: disable Clang warnings on GNU C extensions

commit.subject: LU-16518 utils: fix enum conversion errors in lfs
commit.message:
LU-16518 utils: fix enum conversion errors in lfs

Turn an implicit cast by explicitly casting LMV_HASH_TYPE_UNKNOWN
to 'enum lov_pattern' for lsp_stripe_pattern.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I6aecc333297b97dce3f9f40d68674197cb7baf36
